title: Predicting the SpaceX, OpenAI, and Anthropic IPOs — With Dick Costolo
summary: Dick Costolo, ex-Twitter CEO, discusses the prospects of SpaceX, OpenAI, and Anthropic IPOs on the Big Technology Podcast. The episode covers IPO timing, narrative positioning of each company, competitive differences, and whether AI companies can function as real platforms long-term.
